items.title: Weather Dashboard
items.subtitle: Real-time Weather Tracking App
items.description: A comprehensive weather dashboard displaying current conditions, hourly forecasts, and 7-day predictions. Features interactive charts, geolocation support, and a fully responsive interface optimized for desktop and mobile devices.

items.title: Task Manager API
items.subtitle: RESTful Backend Service
items.description: A scalable REST API for task management with user authentication, role-based access control, and real-time notifications. Includes comprehensive API documentation, rate limiting, and automated testing suite.

items.title: CSS Grid Layout Guide
items.subtitle: Modern Layout Techniques Explained
items.description: An in-depth exploration of CSS Grid layout techniques, covering implicit and explicit grids, template areas, auto-placement algorithms, and responsive patterns without media queries.

items.title: E-commerce Platform
items.subtitle: Full-stack Online Store
items.description: A complete e-commerce platform featuring product catalog, shopping cart, secure checkout, order tracking, and admin dashboard. Implements payment processing, inventory management, and customer analytics.

items.title: Design System Components
items.subtitle: Reusable UI Building Blocks
items.description: A collection of accessible, themeable UI components following atomic design principles. Includes buttons, forms, cards, navigation, modals, and data display components with full documentation and usage examples.

items.title: Authentication Module
items.subtitle: Secure Identity Management
items.description: A drop-in authentication module supporting email/password, OAuth providers, two-factor authentication, and session management. Features secure token handling, password hashing, and brute-force protection.

items.title: Data Visualization Toolkit
items.subtitle: Interactive Charts and Graphs
items.description: A lightweight toolkit for creating interactive data visualizations using SVG and Canvas. Supports bar charts, line graphs, scatter plots, pie charts, and heatmaps with smooth animations and tooltips.

items.title: Responsive Navigation
items.subtitle: Adaptive Menu Component
items.description: A flexible navigation component that adapts seamlessly across screen sizes. Features hamburger menu, mega menus, breadcrumbs, and sidebar navigation with keyboard accessibility and smooth transitions.

items.title: State Management Patterns
items.subtitle: Architectural Best Practices
items.description: A comprehensive guide to state management patterns in frontend applications. Covers pub/sub, flux architecture, reactive stores, and immutable state trees with practical vanilla JavaScript implementations.

items.title: Real-time Chat Interface
items.subtitle: WebSocket-powered Messaging
items.description: A real-time chat application with WebSocket communication, message threading, file sharing, typing indicators, and read receipts. Features end-to-end encryption and offline message queuing.

items.title: Form Validation Library
items.subtitle: Declarative Input Validation
items.description: A zero-dependency form validation library with declarative rules, custom validators, async validation support, and accessible error messaging. Supports complex validation chains and conditional logic.

items.title: Performance Optimization Guide
items.subtitle: Web Vitals and Loading Strategies
items.description: A practical guide to optimizing web performance covering Core Web Vitals, lazy loading strategies, code splitting, caching policies, image optimization, and rendering performance techniques.
